abilities: Let's perk you up. (healing ally on critical HP)
Let's put something on that. (healing ally on critical HP)
Living dangerously, eh? (healing ally on critical HP)
You must take care of yourself. (healing ally on critical HP)
You've never looked better. (fully healing ally)
Lift your friends up, I always say.
I'm not showboating, am I? (after jumping from raised Petal Platform)
Parkour! (after jumping from raised Petal Platform)
Whoosh! (after jumping from raised Petal Platform)
That was a close one! (on low HP)
A big hug for a large friend. (to any tank)
There, we can protect each other now. (to any tank)
Medical gentlemen should stick together. (to Baptiste )
We've always been better as a team. (to Baptiste or Symmetra )
You don't have to do everything alone. (to Illari )
Vaswani! What were you doing over there? (to Symmetra )
My tree is gone. Find cover!
Take cover. The tree is gone!
The tree has fallen! Take care!
chatter: Spend every moment growing into who you truly are.
I wish violence never solved anything. It would make peace so much easier.
I've never been more ready for adventure!
Stay near, will you? I hate when people run off without me!
The suspense is terrible... I hope it'll last.
Well, off to disappoint my mother again.
You look like a talented bunch. This should be quick!
All right, inventors, let's put our contraptions into action! (with multiple inventing Heroes on the team)
Do not fear. You have not one, but two Vishkar architects on your side... Yes. One dropped out, and the other one wants me to shut up. But wait until you see us in action. (with Symmetra on the team)
Stay close, Satya! I know how you like to get into trouble. (with Symmetra on the team)
I love a fresh beginning. All that promise.
I hope they don't take this too personally.
Let's not draw this out. No matter how amusing it'd be!
One more and done, I think!
Being down just makes the comeback all the more exciting.
Don't suppose anyone has a secret plan?
I hope we win. I didn't dress for defeat.
Let's win this time, and be extremely gracious about it.
No stress. We're a third round sort of team.
Ah, the familiar sting of failure.
It's not embarrassing if you're shameless.
I'm not fond of solitude. Where are they?
Perfection at the height of need.
They revived someone? Must admit I'm not thrilled.
Helping others is a gift all its own!
call-outs: Here they come. I'm with you!
They're hungry for a fight. Let's give them one!
The numbers do not favor us.
Trying to be stealthy, are they?
Don't get caught by that turret.
Hold out. We can do this!
Losing now would be such a shame.
We are almost out of time!
eliminations: Better you, I think.
Don't feel bad. I don't!
Every rose has its thorns.
Everyone loses sometimes.
Hate seeing you go!
I suspect they'll hold a grudge.
I thought you had me!
I'd heal that, but... you know...
I'm sharper than I look.
If only we could have met under different circumstances!
Plucked.
Oh, dear.
Oof!
Sorry about that.
Think of it as... experience gained.
Those thorns are sharp, aren't they?
You'll do better next time.
Let me... make it up to you sometime. (eliminating a hero he finds attractive: Baptiste , Cassidy , Echo , Genji , Hanzo , Mauga , Mercy , Sojourn , Soldier: 76 or Sombra )
When you recover, look me up. (eliminating a hero he finds attractive: Baptiste , Cassidy , Echo , Genji , Hanzo , Mauga , Mercy , Sojourn , Soldier: 76 or Sombra )
Immortality is overrated. (eliminating Baptiste )
I know you could have dodged that! (eliminating Cassidy )
We have a lot to teach each other. (eliminating Echo )
Didn't expect to see you here, Shimada. (eliminating Hanzo )
I know. I didn't expect me either. (eliminating another Lifeweaver )
I love when we go dancing. (eliminating Lúcio or Symmetra )
Oh, Dr. Ziegler. We shouldn't fight! (eliminating Mercy )
You're working so much harder than me. (eliminating Moira )
*sigh* Basic biology. (eliminating Moira and Mercy )
We really could've talked things out. (eliminating Moira or Ramattra )
And I thought you knew all my tricks. (eliminating Symmetra )
And that's why you tinker, Vaswani. (eliminating Symmetra )
See, Satya? I've been busy. (eliminating Symmetra )
The Martinses say hello, by the way! (eliminating Torbjörn )
Almost! (on low HP}
So close! (on low HP}
That was mostly luck. (headshot final blow)
Thorns in the face are an inconvenience! (headshot final blow)
Down you come. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Join us on the ground, won't you? (eliminating airborne enemy)
Slow down. Life should be savored. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Speed is good, but it isn't everything. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Sorry to just show up like this. (eliminating enemy after Rejuvenating Dash)
Mind your surroundings when playing with your toys! (eliminating Junkrat using Rip-Tire)
Who takes care of you, Doctor? (eliminating Mercy using Valkyrie)
If you aimed, one shotgun might be enough. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Incredible courage! But your tactics... hmm. (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
Reckless, but I admire your commitment! (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
Let's end it later. (eliminating Sojourn using Overclock)
Forgive me, I didn't see you! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Outdashed this time, I'm afraid. (eliminating Tracer using Blink)
*sigh* The lone rose gets plucked. (eliminating enemy away from their team)
Be sure to comfort each other, will you?
I'm truly humbled to have so many enemies.
Is anyone gonna kill me? No?
Some days, my name's more ironic than others.
They just keep springing up! Amazing!
There, there. We've all done things we regret.
We're chewing through them!
Ah! A little break!
Ooh! A snack break!
Do we have time for a nap, you think?
Ah, the cycle of violence.
This wasn't personal. I mean, it wasn't just personal.
Happy to be of assistance.
I love how we help each other.
Lucky I was here, huh?
You can't die, Satya. We have plans later! (to Symmetra )
Arm's length, please.
I don't think so.
It was a pleasure!
Ha! That wasn't even the sharp hand.
The muscle on you. I got lucky. (eliminating Mauga and Junker Queen )
Ah, my second-favorite season!
At least it was a memorable death!
Down is the cruelest direction...
It caught me by surprise too! If that helps!
Turret decimated.
Turret destroyed.
Such grace and precision!
That'll leave a fetching scar. They should thank you!
You make that look easier than breathing.
Is that the mercenary experience or natural talent? (to Baptiste )
Elegant. Violent! You're the whole package. (to Reaper or Reinhardt )
You really are that girl , Satya. (to Symmetra )
You've picked up a few things since school. (to Symmetra )
My, my! Look at them go! (to Venture )
interactions: Ashe : I hear, if it weren't for your parents, you'd be as much an outlaw as me. Lifeweaver : They're always trying to help, but frankly, I prefer they gave up. Ashe : Yeah? Well, be careful what you wish for.

Lifeweaver : I saw your parents at a few exorbitant parties when I was younger. Never you. Ashe : They didn't care to bring me along. Lifeweaver : A shame. I'm sure two wayward heirs could've got into loads of trouble. Ashe : *quiet chuckle* There's still plenty of time for that.

Ashe : How you making a living without the family fortune? Lifeweaver : Nothing so glamorous as running a gang outlaws, I'm afraid. Ashe : Well, Deadlock Gang would look mighty fine with a rose garden. Lifeweaver : Tempting. But I really should save the world first.

Lifeweaver : I've got reservations at a fantastic restaurant, but... I'm not too sure who to invite. Baptiste : I know a guy. Lifeweaver : Is he, by any chance, a dashing ex-mercenary from the Caribbean? Baptiste : *chuckles* He might just be.
Lifeweaver : I envy your amicable relationship with your family. Brigitte : You aren't in touch with yours? Lifeweaver : We had a shouting match not long ago, if that counts.

Domina : Why must you be so difficult, Niran? Hand over the prototype, and your bounty disappears. Lifeweaver : Quite surprising that someone in your position doesn't recognize a failed negotiation when she sees one... Domina : Oh, how clever! But just because you've called the game doesn't mean I'll stop playing.
Doomfist : You are bold to stand against Vishkar on your own. Lifeweaver : I'm not alone. The scientific community is on my side! Doomfist : It would be wise not to count on that for long.

Lifeweaver : It's monstrous that you were kept locked up for so long. Echo : It didn't feel very long to me. Lifeweaver : Well, should your jailors ever come knocking again? I know a place you'll be safe.

Hanzo : You favor the lotus flower? Enlightenment, rebirth, and peace. Lifeweaver : Ah! You know the language of flowers? Hanzo : I know much that few would suspect. Lifeweaver : Perhaps you are not the nettle you appear to be.
Lifeweaver : I hear you're a poet. Shall we exchange couplets over tea sometime? Hanzo : I would sooner exchange farewells. Lifeweaver : Very creative! Hint taken.

Lifeweaver : Look at us! Two fugitives on the run in the pursuit of a better world. Hazard : Aye, I see you... but I doubt ye've ever had to get those hands dirty. Lifeweaver : Of course I have! I just know the value of clean cuticles.
Hazard : Lovin' the bleached look. You do that yourself? Lifeweaver : Goodness, no. I was just born this dashing. Hazard : Right, well... looks class!

Lifeweaver : Is something on your mind? I'd be happy to lend an ear. Illari : I'd rather not. Talking's pointless. Lifeweaver : Are you sure? I'm a great listener. Illari : Then hear what I just said.

Junkrat : Me mate Roadhog says there's a fetching price on your noggin. Not as high as the one on ours, mind you. Lifeweaver : He said all that? Junkrat : It was more like, " Gonna turn that bloke in. Worth a heap, hurr hurr hurr... " Lifeweaver : Thank you for the warning, and the convincing impression.

Lifeweaver : Are you and Roadhog together? Junkrat : Do you ever see us apart? Lifeweaver : No, I mean, are you a couple ? Junkrat : Yes! A couple of dashing rogues! Not sure what you're missing here...
Kiriko : Might be tricky keeping this bunch alive. Lifeweaver : Between the two of us? How can we fail? Kiriko : What if they run off without us? Lifeweaver : Don't worry. I have a plan for that.

Lifeweaver : I love the warmth in your music. Your newest album is like listening to a sunrise. Lúcio : Wow, thanks. You should tell that to my critics. Lifeweaver : Critics? You? No! I won't stand for it.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Lifeweaver : The magnificent elkhorn coral. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it.
Mauga : They aren't ready for this! Lifeweaver : Perhaps we should use our inside voices? Mauga : This is my inside voice!

Mercy : Biolight has such potential for medicine and agriculture! Lifeweaver : Sadly, Vishkar agrees. They want their hands on it, and they're willing to cut mine off to get it. Mercy : *sigh* Sounds about right.

Moira : There's always room for brilliance at Oasis . Lifeweaver : I'm honored, but I have some reservations about your... oh, what's the word? Moira : Atrocities? Inhumanity? "Crimes against nature"? Lifeweaver :* chuckles * Any of those will do.

Lifeweaver : What is your fascination with artificial decay? Moira : To reverse entropy, we must tame it. Lifeweaver : But inflicting it on yourself? You're withering away! Moira : I've always thrived under a deadline.

Lifeweaver : Have I seen you around the Arcology ? Orisa : My creator, Efi, spoke at a conference there. Lifeweaver : Ah, yes! I didn't know which was more impressive: her presentation on ferrofluid injectors, or her appetite for dumplings at dinner...
Pharah : Why does your face look so familiar? Lifeweaver : There's a price on my head in 17 countries. I'm hoping for an even 20. Pharah : Yeah, that's it.

Lifeweaver : You're so old-fashioned, Reinhardt. A hammer? How marvelous! Reinhardt : I suppose you think I should have a giant laser gun? Lifeweaver : No, lean into it! Get Lindholm to build you one of his big robotic horses .
Lifeweaver : How on earth are you even larger than I thought you'd be? Reinhardt : That's simple! You see, I am standing very close to you. Lifeweaver : And I'd like it to remain that way!
Lifeweaver : With how often we pull people around, we could start a transportation service! Roadhog : How much are we charging? Lifeweaver : Let's discuss the details over tea.
Sigma : Self-propagating biomass? A deadly weapon in the wrong hands. Lifeweaver : No need to fear. I won't sell my biolight to anyone. Sigma : We never plan for our creations to escape our control.
Sojourn : So, you invented a form of light that's somehow alive . What's next for you? Lifeweaver : Saving the earth, and maybe... learning to blow glass. Sojourn : Ha... those are on my list, too.

Lifeweaver : I need durable volunteers for some kinetic biolight experiments. Can I... count on you? Sojourn : I'm not your best subject. This body isn't exactly cutting-edge tech anymore. Lifeweaver : Miss Chase, I insist that you never tear yourself down in my presence again. Sojourn : *chuckle* All right, I get the picture.

Soldier: 76 : The Martinses put their necks on the line, protecting you from Vishkar. Lifeweaver : I only hope one day to return the favor. Soldier: 76 : Heh. If they ever need help, we're all screwed.

Sombra : Pobrecito... I don't know how you manage to scrape by on those million dollar wires from Mom and Dad. Lifeweaver : You mean the million dollar wires I forward to wildlife charities? Sombra : Ay, come on! You've got to have some dirt on you. Lifeweaver : Only when I'm gardening, I fear.
Lifeweaver : Satya, remember our good old days at the academy? Symmetra : You complained constantly about everything and then you dropped out. Lifeweaver : I saw it as an... early graduation.
Lifeweaver : What do you miss most about the academy, Satya? Symmetra : Your snoring. It helped me sleep.

Lifeweaver : You know, you were the best roommate I've ever had. Symmetra : You were third best. The other two went to bed at appropriate times. Lifeweaver : 4 AM is perfectly appropriate if you're working on a great idea!

Lifeweaver : Satya, you must try my latest culinary invention. I call it "The Stoplight"! Symmetra : *sigh* What's in it? Lifeweaver : Mango and pandan jelly blended into a panang curry. Symmetra : I would rather perish.

Lifeweaver : One of the following: Satya, my blossoming spring flower! Light of my life, my reason to live! Satya, my dancing dream, rhythmic ruler of my heart! Satya, my clever little fox, my precious pearl plucked from the depths of the sea! Satya, my radiant moon among the stars, my resonant siren song! Symmetra : *sigh* What, Bua? Lifeweaver : *laughs* What do you mean, "what"? I'm just saying hello.

Lifeweaver : Satya... I wanted to apologize. I should have tried harder to contact you. Symmetra : There is no need, Bua. Our separation was Vishkar's fault, alone. Lifeweaver : At least we're backing touch now. We've been better together. Symmetra : I could not agree more, my friend.

Lifeweaver : Are you sure about returning to Vishkar, Satya? You could always stay at the arcology with me. Symmetra : I may join you one day. But I will uncover more as Vishkar's ally than the enemy.

Symmetra : I am still searching for information on Dr. Bhatt, Niran. Answers are not forthcoming. Lifeweaver : It's an Vishkar's best interest to bury it's founder's vision. But you deserve to know the truth.

Lifeweaver : I saw you writing earlier. Diary? Venture : No, it's more like a record of my hopes and thoughts. Lifeweaver : That's... still a diary, I think. Venture : Nah, it can't be. Not enough stickers in this thing.
Lifeweaver : Don't leap too far away. I can only work a limited amount of miracles. Winston : Worried I'll leave you in a thorny situation? Lifeweaver : Oh dear.

Wrecking Ball : *squeaks* He wants to know if you can make biolight vegetables. Lifeweaver : Yes, but the taste still leaves much to be desired. Wrecking Ball : *squeaks* He says he'll be the judge of that.

Lifeweaver : I heard you hosted my dearest Satya in Suravasa . Zenyatta : She is a delight. How do you know her? Lifeweaver : We were roommates at the academy. My, did she hate it when I left dishes in the sink!
map-specific: Such a tragedy, what happened here. Poor Dr. Zhou .
I keep meaning to visit the Martinses' museum while I'm here. I love how this town honors them.
The pizza here doesn't even come with ketchup. It's outrageous!
The home of the Iris . So inspiring to be in the presence of a force that defines the limits of our understanding.
The pursuit of knowledge unshackled. Tempting, but so dangerous.
